apihelp-shortenurl-summary: U beddel URL dheer mid gaaban.
apihelp-shortenurl-param-qrcode: Hel koodh QR ah. URL-ka ku xiran waxaa la gaabin doonaa oo keliya haddii uu aad u dheer yahay.
apierror-urlshortener-disabled: Lama abuuri karo URL-yada gaagaaban cusub
apierror-urlshortener-permissiondenied: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku abuurto URL-yada gaagaaban
